source.name: Frankfurter
source.notes: Rates are business-day reference rates for 164 Frankfurter-supported currency pairs vs USD; weekends and market holidays are forward-filled.
source.dataset_notes: CSV schema simplified to date, eurusd where eurusd is the EUR/USD rate value. Source attribution is stored in this metadata file.
